examples: Greg suggested the following ways to gauge the criticality of the project.
The metadata can provide information like WS-* compliance, business criticality, and so on.
In technical terms, systems on the edge of chaos are said to be in a state of "self-organised criticality".
Meltdown: This stretches the analogy but essentially the conditions for sustaining the criticality can just breakdown.
However, this usually leads to the rapid expansion of the reagents that shuts down the criticality.
